steps.title: Identify the slope from the rate of change
steps.content:
The problem states: for every increase in $x$ by 1, the value of $y$ increases by 8. This rate of change is the slope, so $m = 8$, and the equation has the form $y = 8x + b$.

Checking the choices:
  • A: $y = 2x + 18$ (slope = 2)
  • B: $y = 2x + 8$ (slope = 2)
  • C: $y = 8x + 2$ (slope = 8) ✓
  • D: $y = 3x + 26$ (slope = 3)
Only choice C has slope 8.

steps.title: Find the y-intercept using the given point
steps.content:
Use the point $(2, 18)$ to find $b$:
$$18 = 8(2) + b$$
$$18 = 16 + b$$
$$b = 2$$
The equation is $y = 8x + 2$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
